title: Get proof of a partner has been arrested for domestic abuse
body: "To get a copy of the police charge sheet, you should:   fill in as much as you can of the sample letter send it to the Data Protection Officer at the police force which granted bail   You may have to pay a fee for your copy.  You can use the evidence if you’re applying for legal aid to divorce or separate from an abusive partner.  They must have been arrested for one of these domestic abuse offences. "
